abilities.description: Add two mana in any combination of colors. Spend this mana only to cast creature spells.
Each player's life total becomes the number of creatures they control. Activate only if creatures you control have total power 8 or greater.

effect.description: Each player's life total becomes the number of creatures they control. Activate only if creatures you control have total power 8 or greater.
effect.name: RepeatEach
